pull_requests.title: Fix: race condition in challenge submission handler
pull_requests.author: vedikathalkar
commit_messages: fix: prevent duplicate submission on slow network retry
test: add coverage for concurrent submit calls
pull_requests.body: Fixes #58210. The submission handler did not guard against duplicate concurrent requests when a client retried after a slow response, causing double XP awards. Added a mutex-style lock keyed on userId+challengeId and a regression test.

pull_requests.title: fix(curriculum): correct broken link in JS basics lesson 12
pull_requests.author: anita-dev
commit_messages: fix(curriculum): correct broken link in JS basics lesson 12
pull_requests.body: Fixes #58201. The MDN link for Array.prototype.map returned a 404 due to a locale prefix typo. Updated to the canonical URL.

pull_requests.title: fix: CSV export allows formula injection via user-supplied notes field
pull_requests.author: rahul-sec
commit_messages: fix: sanitize leading =,+,-,@ chars before CSV export
pull_requests.body: Fixes #58255. User notes containing values like =cmd|'/c calc'!A1 were exported unsanitized, enabling formula injection if the CSV is opened in Excel/Sheets. Prefixing risky leading characters with a single quote per OWASP guidance.

pull_requests.title: fix duplicate session bug
pull_requests.author: another_farmer
pull_requests.body: this also fixes the session issue mentioned somewhere
